hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-heading tracking-tight text-deep-ink leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-heading tracking-tight text-deep-ink
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-emerald-700 font-semibold

homepage.description: Minimalist, central focus. The 'ONE BIG BAR' is the absolute hero. Generous spacing (p-12 to p-32).
homepage.rules: Avoid cluttered navigation. Central layout with organic, earthy background (soft noise + warm cream). Center alignment is strictly for the main hero heading and input bar, left-align descriptive texts.

classroom.description: Three-pane layout: Left Sidebar (20% - chapters/index), Center Main (55% - AI Tutor Chat & Lesson Content), Right Panel (25% - Mind Map, Notes, Quiz).
classroom.rules: Use h-screen with overflow-hidden on the main container. Internal scroll per pane. Use 1px solid borders between panes to evoke a structured, 'academic editorial' workspace.

dashboard.description: Bento Grid high-density mode for tracking study hours, level, comprehension %, and spaced repetition.
dashboard.rules: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop shadows. Utilize 'Optical Clarity' for headers.

one_big_bar.description: The main ingestion component on the homepage for links and files.
one_big_bar.style: Massive (h-16 to h-20), pill-shaped (rounded-full) or rounded-2xl. Deep tinted shadow (shadow-2xl shadow-emerald-900/10). Internal padding p-4 to p-6. Font size text-lg to text-xl. Must include an integrated dropdown for 'Spiegazione Level' (Child/High School/University/Expert).

chat_message.description: AI Tutor and User messages within the Virtual Classroom.
chat_message.style: AI (Tutor): Glassmorphism surface (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/40) or soft cream. User (Feynman Mode): Solid Academic Emerald (bg-primary text-white).

hai_capito_modal.style: Centered dialog with backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90. High contrast, distinct CTA buttons. Should feel like a supportive interruption.

mind_map_node.style: Neo-brutalist or delicate outline: border-2 border-emerald-800 rounded-lg p-3 bg-cream text-deep-ink text-sm font-semibold.

quiz_card.style: Neumorphic tactile variant: mix soft ambient shadow with sharp 1px inner contrast border (border-black/5).

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle CSS/SVG grain/noise filter over the main background to eliminate digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient + Direct. Never use default generic Tailwind shadows for major elements; tint them with the primary hue (e.g., shadow-emerald-900/5).
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders pervasively instead of heavy drop shadows to create a structured, academic paper feel (Grid Borders style).

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-0.5 and shadow expansion. Text color MUST contrast correctly on hover.
motion.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up via framer-motion.
motion.marquee: Use a slow-moving, elegant editorial ribbon at the bottom of the hero for supported formats (YouTube, PDF, Word, PowerPoint, EPUB, ecc.).

image_urls.description: Warm grand library. Use at very low opacity (10-15%) behind the main input bar or blended into the Warm Cream background to give an academic, historical feel.
Books and glasses on a table by the window. Perfect for the 'Come Funziona / Metodo' section.
Abstract network of dots. Use for dashboard hero or mind-map promotional feature section.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: You are building a pure .js (React+Vite) frontend. DO NOT USE TYPESCRIPT (.tsx/.ts). Write all components in .jsx or .js files.
Translate all UI copy to Italian (e.g., 'Carica un file o incolla un link', 'Hai capito?', 'Spiegami questo come se avessi 10 anni').
Implement the 'ONE BIG BAR' prominently on the Homepage. Do not hide it. Next to the input, include the Explanation Level selector (Bambino/Superiori/Universitario/Esperto).
For the Virtual Classroom, implement a responsive 3-column layout. Sidebar: chapters/progress. Middle: AI Chat/Feynman mode. Right: Mindmap/Notes/Quiz.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for dropdowns, modals, or sticky headers. Always use a solid background or glassmorphism (bg-white/90 + backdrop-blur-xl).
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns) based on role, e.g., data-testid='upload-input', data-testid='hai-capito-btn'.
universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic purple gradients. Stick strictly to the 'Warm Cream + Deep Ink + Academic Emerald' palette. This is an Old Money Tech / Academic aesthetic.
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings. Use 'EB Garamond' (serif) to inject personality and academic authority.
Do NOT center align body text. Left-align for superior readability.
Spacing is luxury: Use 2-3x more padding than usual (e.g., p-8, p-12, gap-8).
Buttons should be elegant: rounded-full or rounded-md with crisp borders and subtle hover state (-translate-y-1 + shadow).
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., spaced repetition reminders, 'Modalità Maestro attivata').
